element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic throughout adventure, compared to Castlevania series whip mechanics
Baseline enemy type for whip combat practice
Single-use weapon for specific areas only
Single-use weapon for specific areas only
Single-use weapon for specific areas only
Accompanies player for remainder of adventure
Competing for ancient idol treasures throughout quest
Unknown motives, connected to Hastur cult lore
Primary objective: locate three scattered idols before Tresidder

typical_tension_triggers: Presence of Sigfried and Hastur cult implications
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Action-adventure with location-based tension escalation; alternates between exploration/narrative moments and combat encounters across diverse global destinations

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Special areas designated for single-use weapons (specific locations in Mexico, Peru, trains, forest, Grand Canyon)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to whip mechanics and basic stonehead enemies in foundational tomb sequences
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of alternate weapons in Mexico/Peru regions; companion Annet joins; Tresidder rivalry escalates
difficulty_curve.late_game: Forest and Grand Canyon sequences with hammerlike weapon; increased stakes with Sigfried/Hastur cult presence; final idol collection push
notable_spikes: Peru ruins encounter (introduction of companion and narrative complexity)
Sigfried encounter (unknown threat with cult connections)

notable_level_patterns.description: Exploration-based levels in Mexico and Peru featuring whip combat against enemies, structured around collecting idol fragments or clues
Dynamic level design using moving platforms (trains) with combat encounters integrated into traversal challenges
Designated zones where special weapons (exploding rocks, morning star, hammerlike) are introduced and used in limited capacity before being discarded
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Mexico, Peru, Forest, and Grand Canyon regions each house specific weapon implementations

notable_level_patterns.description: Story-critical moments where character interactions occur (companion joining, antagonist confrontations, mysterious figure appearances)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Peru ruins (Annet), various locations (Tresidder encounters), unspecified locations (Sigfried meetings)
